name: get_current_datetime
description: Get the current date and time formatted as a readable string.

name: get_hourly_forecast
description: Get hourly weather forecast for a specific location and date. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, cloud cover, and weather conditions for each hour of the specified date. If latitude and longitude is missing, it will use current location based on IP.

current_location.description: Whether to use the current location based on IP address. If true, 'latitude' and 'longitude' will be ignored

latitude.description: Specified latitude (e.g., 37.7749). Ignored if 'current_location' is true. Can be searched by tool.

longitude.description: Specified longitude (e.g., -122.4194). Ignored if 'current_location' is true. Can be searched by tool.

date.description: Date for the forecast in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2026-01-15'). Must be within the available forecast range.

name: get_current_location
description: Get the current geographical location based on IP address. Returns latitude, longitude, city, and country information.

name: search_and_read_web_link
description: Search the web based on the given query using SerpAPI and optionally read content from the top result links. Returns titles, links, snippets, and optionally extracted content from the pages.

query.description: Search query string to look up using SerpAPI.

num_results.description: Number of top search results to retrieve and optionally read content from. Default is 1.

read.description: Whether to fetch and read content from the result links. Default is true.(If false, only titles, links, and snippets are returned.)

name: add_note
description: Add a note to one or multiple dates. The note will be stored with a unique UUID identifier and can be added to multiple dates at once.

note_text.description: The content of the note to be added.

dates.description: List of dates in YYYY-MM-DD format to add this note to. The same note will be added to all specified dates. If add one date, provide a single-item list.

name: read_note
description: Read notes by date or by note ID. Can provide date to get all notes for that date, or provide ID to get a specific note, or provide both to get both results.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format to retrieve all notes for that date. Optional if id is provided.

id.description: Unique note ID (UUID) to retrieve a specific note. Optional if date is provided.

name: check_note
description: Check how many notes exist for a specific date and list their IDs.

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format to check for notes.

name: delete_note
description: Delete a note by its unique ID. If the date has no remaining notes after deletion, the date entry will also be removed from storage.
